digest.title: 3-month fluoride recall cuts caries recurrence 38% better than 6-month
digest.summary: A 2,100-patient RCT found that 3-month fluoride varnish recall appointments reduced caries recurrence by 38% compared to the standard 6-month schedule in high-risk adult patients.

digest.title: DCI revised radiograph dose limits effective Nov 1 2026
digest.summary: The Dental Council of India revised maximum permissible radiograph dose limits for patients. Practices must update informed consent forms by Nov 1, 2026.

patient_content_library.title: 3 things your teeth tell you about your heart
patient_content_library.body: Did you know? Gum disease increases cardiovascular risk by 20%. Regular cleaning = healthy smile + healthy heart. Book your recall today.

patient_content_library.title: Exam stress and your teeth
patient_content_library.body: Stress during exam season causes bruxism (teeth grinding) in 1 in 4 students. Signs: jaw soreness, sensitive teeth. Ask us about a night guard.

seasonal_beats.note: wedding whitening peak — target brides/grooms 6-8 weeks before season
